target_1.title: Xinference Llama3 Tool Parser - eval() RCE Vulnerability
target_1.report_body:
Critical RCE vulnerability found in llama3_tool_parser.py at line 46.
The model_output is passed directly to eval({}, {}, {}) allowing command injection.
Bypass possible via builtins access.
CVSS Score: 9.8 (Critical)

target_2.title: MiniRAG Path Traversal Vulnerability
target_2.report_body:
Path Traversal found in /documents/upload endpoint.
The filename is not sanitized, allowing '..' sequences to write files outside the intended directory.
Risk: High (CWE-22)
